title: Set & Sorted Set
description: Operasi pada tipe data Set (unordered unique) dan Sorted Set (ordered with score) di Redis.

commands.name: SADD / SMEMBERS / SISMEMBER
commands.title: Set: Menambah dan Melihat Member
commands.description: Operasi dasar pada Set — kumpulan nilai unik tanpa urutan.
commands.syntax:
SADD key member [member ...]
SMEMBERS key
SISMEMBER key member
commands.examples:
SADD tags:article:1 "redis" "nosql" "database"
SMEMBERS tags:article:1
SISMEMBER tags:article:1 "redis"  # 1
SCARD tags:article:1              # 3
SREM tags:article:1 "nosql"
SPOP tags:article:1
SRANDMEMBER tags:article:1 2      # 2 random members
commands.notes: Set cocok untuk tags, unique visitors, online users, dll.

commands.name: SUNION / SINTER / SDIFF
commands.title: Set: Operasi Himpunan
commands.description: Operasi matematika himpunan: union, intersection, difference.
commands.syntax:
SUNION key [key ...]
SINTER key [key ...]
SDIFF key [key ...]
commands.examples:
SADD user:1:skills "python" "javascript" "redis"
SADD user:2:skills "javascript" "golang" "redis"

SUNION user:1:skills user:2:skills   # semua skills
SINTER user:1:skills user:2:skills   # skills bersama
SDIFF user:1:skills user:2:skills    # skills unik user:1

SINTERSTORE common_skills user:1:skills user:2:skills
commands.notes: Operasi himpunan sangat berguna untuk mutual friends, common interests, dll.

commands.name: ZADD / ZRANGE / ZSCORE
commands.title: Sorted Set: Operasi Dasar
commands.description: Sorted Set — set dengan score untuk ordering. Cocok untuk leaderboard, ranking.
commands.syntax:
ZADD key [NX|XX] [GT|LT] score member [score member ...]
ZRANGE key min max [BYSCORE|BYLEX] [LIMIT offset count]
ZSCORE key member

options.description: Update hanya jika score baru > score lama

commands.examples:
# Leaderboard
ZADD leaderboard 100 "Alice" 85 "Bob" 95 "Charlie"
ZRANGE leaderboard 0 -1 WITHSCORES          # ascending
ZRANGE leaderboard 0 -1 REV WITHSCORES      # descending
ZSCORE leaderboard "Alice"                   # 100
ZRANK leaderboard "Alice"                    # ranking
ZREVRANK leaderboard "Alice"                 # 0 (top)

# Update score
ZADD leaderboard GT 110 "Bob"                # update hanya jika lebih tinggi
ZINCRBY leaderboard 5 "Charlie"              # increment score
commands.notes: Sorted Set sangat efisien untuk leaderboard, rate limiting, dan priority queue.

commands.name: ZRANGEBYSCORE / ZREM
commands.title: Sorted Set: Filter dan Hapus
commands.description: Query berdasarkan score range dan menghapus member.
commands.syntax:
ZRANGEBYSCORE key min max [WITHSCORES] [LIMIT offset count]
ZREM key member [member ...]
ZREMRANGEBYSCORE key min max
commands.examples:
ZRANGEBYSCORE leaderboard 80 100 WITHSCORES
ZRANGEBYSCORE leaderboard -inf +inf  # semua
ZCOUNT leaderboard 90 100
ZREM leaderboard "Bob"
ZREMRANGEBYSCORE leaderboard 0 50   # hapus score 0-50

# Pattern: Sliding window rate limiter
ZADD requests:user:1 timestamp1 req1
ZREMRANGEBYSCORE requests:user:1 0 (now-60)
ZCARD requests:user:1  # request dalam 60 detik terakhir
commands.notes: -inf dan +inf digunakan untuk min/max tanpa batas.
